#  Unassign an RFI in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The RFIs page in the Bid Room is a powerful tool that allows you to manage RFIs from your vendors and keep information consistent across all bidders. If an RFI was previously assigned to a member of the Bid Room Team, but it does not need to be assigned to that member, you can unassign the RFI.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Limited' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Limited' access must be on the Bid Room Team for the project.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Bid Room** you want to manage RFIs for.
  2. Click the **RFIs** tab.
  3. Click the RFI that you want to unassign from a member of the Bid Room Team.
  4. Click **Unassign**.


## See Also
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Assign an RFI to Bid Room Team Member in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/assign-an-rfi-to-a-bid-room-team-member-in-portfolio-financials)
  * [Post an RFI in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/post-an-rfi-in-portfolio-financials)
title: Unassign an RFI in Portfolio Financials
description: How to unassign an RFI that was previously assigned to a member of the Bid Room Team in Portfolio Financials.
